name: Optimization Loop - Chimera Upgrade
description: Integration of DeepSeek-R1-Chimera (swapped to Llama 70B for speed) for handling Digest messages.

userStories.title: Configure Chimera Provider
acceptanceCriteria: Mapped to `meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free` for performance (Chimera R1 was 0.2 msg/sec).
userStories.completionNotes: Configured successfully. Switched model to Llama 70B due to R1 latency.

userStories.title: Implement Digest Routing
userStories.description: Modify `src/extraction_pipeline.py` to route messages > 1500 chars to AI.
acceptanceCriteria: Digest messages bypass RuleBased logic (or force AI in addition).
userStories.completionNotes: Implemented 'Force AI' strategy. Digest messages are processed by both Regex and AI, then merged.

userStories.title: Benchmark Verification
userStories.completionNotes: Recall improved from 64% to 77%. Speed is the tradeoff for Llama 70B accuracy.
